mapper.select:
SELECT ER_NUM, TET_NUM, USER_NUM, ER_ATTEMPT, ER_SCORE, ER_PASS, ER_DATE
FROM EXAM_RESULT WHERE ER_NUM = #{erNum}

SELECT ER_NUM, TET_NUM, USER_NUM, ER_ATTEMPT, ER_SCORE, ER_PASS, ER_DATE
FROM EXAM_RESULT WHERE USER_NUM = #{userNum} ORDER BY ER_NUM DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO EXAM_RESULT(ER_NUM, TET_NUM, USER_NUM, ER_ATTEMPT, ER_SCORE, ER_PASS, ER_DATE) VALUES (#{erNum},#{tetNum},#{userNum},#{erAttempt},#{erScore},#{erPass},SYSDATE)
mapper.select: SELECT SEQ_EXAM_RESULT.NEXTVAL AS ER_NUM FROM DUAL

SELECT userName, subjectName, bcScore, passed FROM ( SELECT ROWNUM RN, U.USER_NAME AS userName, C.CLA_TITLE AS subjectName, C.CLA_BONUS AS bcScore, E.ER_PASS AS passed FROM EXAM_RESULT E JOIN USERS U ON E.USER_NUM = U.USER_NUM JOIN TEST T ON E.TET_NUM = T.TET_NUM JOIN CLASS C ON T.CLA_NUM = C.CLA_NUM WHERE ROWNUM <= #{limit} ) WHERE RN >= #{offset}
